title: selaginella correae
intro: Selaginella correae, also known as Correa's spike moss, is a species of evergreen perennial plant in the family Selaginellaceae, characterized by its small, scale-like leaves and ability to thrive in a variety of environments. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Selaginella correae are thought to include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as potentially providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
